[Gulf of Riga] LATVIAN NAV WARN 012/26
BALTIC SEA. GULF OF RIGA
NAVAL FIRING EXERCISES IN PROGRESS FROM 041100 UTC TO 041900 UTC MAY
AND 050700 UTC TO 051900 UTC MAY IN PRACTICE AREA "M1" CENTERED IN 57-26N 023-45E
AREA IS CLOSED FOR NAVIGATION DURING EXERCISES
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED
CANCEL THIS MSG 052000 UTC MAY
